textByHash.17d6e46b0d351995099ffa795841c0f69d53afeb: Tee hee! You've never milked a cow before, have you?
textByHash.405e17294750447b1e3a4f9f7e0f49028a38aa5f: You're from the city, aren't you... Try it again with an empty bucket.
textByHash.b96cc312a1f73aa1651062e4006df64f363fcc74: Because you're spilling milk all over the floor. What a waste! You need something to hold the milk.
